sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 23:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 23:1
items.html: Because the bottom Hey connected only in MA and BON, and not in the Partzufim before it. She comes from below Tabur of the inner AK, which is the root of any restriction and judgement in the worlds. (Inner Observation, Item 8)
